name: cashsnap_two_stage_strictbest_trueempty_proposal_gate_browser_stack

evidence.summary: Current-domain pretrained true-empty proposal gate at reject>=0.99 preserved real val/test recall exactly, improved test precision 0.2316 -> 0.3809, cut test background-FP images 533/748 -> 87/748, improved count MAE 1.0423 -> 0.4763, and raised exact-value test images 491 -> 945.

known_limits: Diagnostic stack only; it is a proposal rejection gate, not a detector mAP improvement.
The gate was trained with semantic likely-true-empty rows and edge-positive target support; do not replace those source policies with the raw empty-label bucket.
Use reject>=0.99 as the safe operating point from current evidence. reject>=0.95 cuts more FPs but rejected one TP-like proposal on val and one on test.
This gate suppresses background-like proposals but does not solve denomination confusion or out-of-scope foreign-note routing by itself.
